data.body: B2+B4 plan-review PASS. B2 = contextvar sink at _seam.append_event (edit surface: _seam.py + import_ndjson.py); batched passes 1/2a/2c/2d, per-event 2b(links)/2e(statuses). B4 = commit-count benchmark (delta==2*ceil(3000/256)=24) + malformed-chunk rollback + crash-resume (K=2 CREATE-only, resume via source_id). #459 Verified+1, LLM-Review down (repo-wide bot outage). Setting up auto-retry+submit watcher.
